title: OR operator in WHERE clause gives wrong answer when indexed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Bob', NULL, 'bob@example.com');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age = 30 OR email = 'bob@example.com';
key_bug_features: OR operator in WHERE clause with indexed columns
